summary: This dataset contains multiple financial measures (sale price, units sold, cogs, profit, discounts, gross sales). Revenue has been inferred as 'gross sales' based on semantic matching. ReportGenie AI analyzed 700 rows and found total revenue of 127931598.5. Revenue appears to show latest period growth of 81.28%, and the overall trend direction is upward. Confidence score: 0.73. Duplicate records detected (280) which may inflate KPIs.
